name: Hover dropdown / mega menu
structure: nav item reveals panel with title+subtext entries on hover
visual: Hover dropdown / mega-menu: a panel of title+subtext entries (and sometimes columns) with a rotating ChevronDown.
states: Reveals on hover/focus; chevron rotates; panel fades/slides.
animation: Panel fade + slide-down (150–200ms) on hover/focus; chevron rotates 180°.
realWorld: bexio: two-tier audience nav (Unternehmer / Treuhänder) + dropdowns
